dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates 100% adherence to defined protocols. Each reasoning step, from the rule loading through to the architectural intent generation, concluded with a schema_validation_success event, ensuring all outputs met the strict governance requirements.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map span processed a significant volume of data (55,290 tokens), indicating a deep exploration of how specific work items evolve into architectural changes. The transition from mapping to intent is logical and continuous.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment engine and intent generator spans show robust processing of architectural constraints. The token count for these spans suggests a thorough evaluation of trade-offs before finalizing the architectural intent.
